ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., transistor, diode, amplifier) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet of the component */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the component information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., voltage, current, resistance) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., V, A, ohm) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance of the parameter (e.g., ±10%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., Ebers-Moll, Shockley diode equation) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_equation" TEXT /* Mathematical equation or formula of the model */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or source of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_models_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being simulated */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the simulation (in Celsius) */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the simulation (in Volts) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the simulation (in Hz) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation (in seconds) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., gain, efficiency, power output) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result (e.g., dB, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_components" (
  "project_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-component pair */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used in the project */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the component in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_simulations" (
  "project_simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-simulation pair */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run for the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_simulations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "invited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who invited the collaborator */,
  "accepted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_invited_by FOREIGN KEY ("invited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_revisions" (
  "project_revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project revision */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_revisions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_revisions" (
  "simulation_revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation revision */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_revisions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_models_history" (
  "model_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model history entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_models_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES component_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_models_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_models_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_models_history" (
  "simulation_model_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation model history entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_model_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_models_history_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_models_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES component_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_models_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
